name: whiteboard.addShape
description: Add a shape (sticky note, text, rectangle, etc.) to a whiteboard canvas. The shape is auto-positioned on a grid layout if no explicit position is given. Useful for agents to programmatically build out brainstorm boards.

room_id.description: Whiteboard room ID to add the shape to (optional, uses session)

shape_type.description: Type of shape: 'note' (sticky note), 'text' (text annotation), or 'geo' (geometric shape). Defaults to 'note'.

x.description: Optional X position on canvas. Auto-positioned if omitted.

y.description: Optional Y position on canvas. Auto-positioned if omitted.

width.description: Optional shape width in pixels. Uses sensible defaults per shape type.

height.description: Optional shape height in pixels. Uses sensible defaults per shape type.

metadata.description: Optional metadata to attach to the shape (e.g. category, source)

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session)

org_id.description: Organization ID for multi-tenant context (optional, uses session)
